ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reactions" (
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reaction */,
  "reaction_name" TEXT /* Name of the reaction */,
  "reaction_number" INTEGER /* Number assigned to the reaction */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pathway the reaction belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reaction (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the reaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reaction was last updated */,
  "enzyme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enzyme catalyzing the reaction (if applicable) */,
  "stoichiometry" TEXT /* Stoichiometric coefficients of reactants and products */,
  "reaction_type" TEXT /* Type of reaction (e.g., oxidation, reduction, hydrolysis) */,
  "equilibrium_constant" REAL /* Equilibrium constant of the reaction */,
  "references" TEXT /* List of external references or publications related to the reaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reactions_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathways" (
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pathway */,
  "pathway_name" TEXT /* Name of the pathway */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the pathway */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pathway was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pathway was last updated */,
  "pathway_type" TEXT /* Type of pathway (e.g., glycolysis, citric acid cycle) */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism in which the pathway is found */,
  "taxonomic_id" INTEGER /* Taxonomic ID of the organism */,
  "external_links" TEXT /* Links to external databases or resources related to the pathway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reaction_steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each step */,
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reaction the step belongs to */,
  "step_number" INTEGER /* Number of the step in the reaction */,
  "step_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the step */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions required for the step */,
  "reactants" TEXT /* Reactants involved in the step */,
  "products" TEXT /* Products generated by the step */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the step was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the step was last updated */,
  "catalyst" TEXT /* Catalyst used in the step (if applicable) */,
  "is_reversible" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the step is reversible */,
  "rate_constant" REAL /* Rate constant of the step */,
  "activation_energy" REAL /* Activation energy required for the step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reaction_steps_reaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("reaction_id") REFERENCES reactions ("reaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reaction_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the step the condition is associated with */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of the condition (e.g., pH, temperature) */,
  "condition_value" TEXT /* Value of the condition */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the condition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the condition was last updated */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the condition (e.g., 30 minutes) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to achieve the condition (e.g., pH meter, temperature control) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reaction_conditions_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("step_id") REFERENCES reaction_steps ("step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reactants" (
  "reactant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reactant */,
  "reactant_name" TEXT /* Name of the reactant */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the reactant */,
  "chemical_formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the reactant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the reactant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reactant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reactant was last updated */,
  "state" TEXT /* Physical state of the reactant (e.g., solid, liquid, gas) */,
  "isotope_label" TEXT /* Isotopic label used in the reactant (if applicable) */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the reactant (e.g., commercial, custom synthesis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reactant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the product */,
  "chemical_formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  "state" TEXT /* Physical state of the product (e.g., solid, liquid, gas) */,
  "isotope_label" TEXT /* Isotopic label used in the product (if applicable) */,
  "purity" TEXT /* Purity of the product (e.g., 99.9%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., Research, Data Analysis) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or university the user is affiliated with */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the reaction or pathway */,
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reaction being accessed */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pathway being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the reaction or pathway was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., laptop, mobile) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session ID for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_reaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("reaction_id") REFERENCES reactions ("reaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
